# Skill Creator

## Overview

Guides through the full process of creating a new Claude skill, from concept to packaging.

## Subdirectories

- `agents/` - Agent configuration files
- `assets/` - Static assets
- `eval-viewer/` - Evaluation viewer tool
- `references/` - Reference documentation
- `scripts/` - Build and packaging scripts

## Workflow

1. Define skill metadata (name, description) in YAML frontmatter
2. Write instructions in markdown
3. Create evaluation criteria
4. Package for distribution
